incident.message: Overriding method should call `super.onBackPressed`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.17.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.11.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.recyclerview:recyclerview than 1.3.2 is available: 1.4.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-ktx than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-compiler than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android than 1.7.3 is available: 1.9.0
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity-compose than 1.8.2 is available: 1.12.4
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-compose than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
Use `app:drawableStartCompat` instead of `android:drawableStart`
Should not set both `PARTIAL_WAKE_LOCK` and `ACQUIRE_CAUSES_WAKEUP`. If you do not want the screen to turn on, get rid of `ACQUIRE_CAUSES_WAKEUP`
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Very long vector path (904 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.HardReminder`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.HardReminder`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.HardReminder`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.HardReminder`)
`activity_settings.xml` has more than 80 views, bad for performance
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Hardcoded string "App icon", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Hard Reminder", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Reminders that never miss", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "APP INFO", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Version", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Build", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Package", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "FEATURES", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "✓ Reliable alarms using AlarmClock API
✓ Survives app close & device reboot
✓ Multiple repeat modes (daily, weekly, custom)
✓ Prior notifications to cancel if busy
✓ Snooze support with configurable duration
✓ Full-screen alarm with sound & vibration
✓ Battery optimization bypass
✓ Persistent foreground service", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "UPDATE INFO", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "Each update increments the build number to ensure smooth installation over previous versions. Your reminders and settings are preserved across updates.", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Made with ❤ for reliability", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Reminder Title", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Message (optional)", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Date & Time", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Select Date", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Select Time", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Repeat", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Repeat type", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Select repeat type", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Mon", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Tue", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Wed", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Thu", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Fri", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string " days", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Prior Notification", should use `@string` resource
